myReviewRequests.description: Title of the page that shows the list of review requests that you’ve made.

onlyYouCanSee.message: Only you can see this page.
onlyYouCanSee.description: Message shown under the title of the page.

notPublished.message: You haven’t requested a review yet.
notPublished.description: Message shown under the title of the page.

appearHere.message: When you do, it’ll appear here.
appearHere.description: Text shown alongside “You haven’t requested a review yet”.

requestAReview.description: Text of the button that takes you to the page where you can request a review.
